name: Ultimate Chocolate Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease a rectangular pan, 13x9x2 inches.
3. In a medium bowl, combine cocoa and baking soda.
4. Blend in 1/3 cup melted butter.
5. Add boiling water; stir until the mixture thickens.
6. Stir in sugar, eggs, and remaining 1/3 cup melted butter; stir until smooth.
7. Add flour, vanilla extract, and salt; blend completely.
8. Stir in chocolate chips.
9. Pour batter into prepared pan and bake for 35 to 40 minutes, or until the brownies begin to pull away from the sides of the pan.
10. Allow the brownies to cool completely in the pan.
11. Frost with one bowl buttercream frosting.
12. Cut into squares.
